= [[Species War]] =
Icons for [[Species War]]

= Chronicles =
== Dung Beetle ==
[[File:Earthworms.png|150px]]

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|E Grenadier Platoon}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|E Grenadier Battalion}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|E Grenadier Regiment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|E Grenadier Brigade}}
|}

== Mantis ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Martial Prestige}}
|}

== Surf Clam ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Energy Conflux}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Forbidden Shadow}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Growth Magic}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Magic Energy}}
|}

= Currency =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Drill Bit}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gold token}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Silver token}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Species Chest Voucher}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Species Essence}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dung Beetle Cash}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Surf Clam Cash}}
|}

= Embryo =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ryurik Embryo I}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ryurik Embryo II}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ryurik Embryo III}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ryurik Embryo IV}}
|}

= Gene Essence =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dung Beetles Gene Essence}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Goldfish Gene Essence}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Hamsters Gene Essence}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Mantises Gene Essence}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Surf Clams Gene Essence}}
|}

= Incident Resource =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Compressed Food}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cult Token}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Everfrozen Crystal}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Karma Token}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Key}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Underwater Agarwood}}
|}

= Resource =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fossil Material}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fossil Material a}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fossil Material b}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fossil Material y}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Surf Clam Fossil}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Surf Clam's Remains}}
|}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Species War]]
